384PP.notes: Echo Qualified 384-well polypropylene source. DMSO compatible. Beckman 001-14555/14615/14618. Echo 550 compatible (uses 384PP insert).

384LDV.notes: Echo Qualified 384-well low dead volume (cyclic olefin copolymer). DMSO working volume 3-12 uL. Beckman 001-12782/16128/6025. Echo 550 compatible (uses 384LDV/1536LDV insert). X/Y offsets match legacy Echo repo 384-source protocols; dead volume was not present there.

1536LDV.notes: Echo Qualified 1536-well low dead volume (cyclic olefin copolymer). General working volume 1-5.5 uL. Beckman 001-6969/8768/7913. Echo 550 compatible (uses 384LDV/1536LDV insert). x/y offsets not yet calibrated.

1536LDV_GNF10.notes: Echo Qualified 1536-well low dead volume (cyclic olefin copolymer), barcoded in GNF10 format. Physically identical to 1536LDV. Beckman 001-7752. Echo 550 compatible. x/y offsets not yet calibrated.
